case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES,LLC VS. JIT SINGH

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-25-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES,LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SINGH, JIT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-25-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
